positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial mandala featuring bioluminescent flora and constellations. The central motif is a geometric arrangement of stylized lunar phases surrounding a central, glowing nebula core. Incorporate vibrant deep indigo blues, emerald greens, gold leaf accents, and creamy ivory tones. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical, centered, and suitable for repeating textile print. Clean, crisp vector line art blended with ethereal watercolor gradients. Strong contrast between the glowing elements and the deep midnight background. Intricate, mystical, decorative, perfect for a high-detail apparel print.
negative: blurry, lowres, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, messy, signature, bad anatomy, cropped, out of frame, noise, distortion, duplicate, grainy
